# docs/ — generated static site

This directory is the **published site** served at:

https://natnew.github.io/Awesome-Agentic-Engineering/

**Do not edit files here by hand.** Everything in this directory (except this `README.md`) is generated by:

```bash
python -m repo_agent workflow render-site
```

The sources of truth are the Markdown files at the repo root (`README.md`, `RUBRIC.md`, `ANTI-PATTERNS.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`) and the files under `appendix/`.

## Preview locally

From the repo root:

```bash
python -m repo_agent workflow render-site
python -m http.server --directory docs 8000
```

Then open http://localhost:8000/.

## Regenerating in CI

`.github/workflows/phase-7-publish-site.yml` runs the renderer on every push to `main` that touches a content file and opens a PR titled `chore(docs): regenerate site` if the output drifts.

`.github/workflows/phase-7-render-check.yml` runs `--check` on every PR and fails (advisory) if `docs/` is stale.

## Enabling GitHub Pages

One-time maintainer action after merge: **Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source: Deploy from a branch → Branch: `main` / `/docs` → Save.** The `.nojekyll` file in this directory disables Jekyll processing so the raw HTML is served as-is.
